channel.title: Does Frontity automatically Lazy load images from Wordpress?
channel.description:
Hi,
This may seem like a stupid question & maybe I've misread the docs but I can't figure out if Frontity automatically Lazy Loads images from Wordpress? I've seen the <Image/> component mentioned, but if the images come from Wordpress via the HTM2React processor, then it isn't using an <Image/> component. Can anyone clarify this for me?

item.title: Does Frontity automatically Lazy load images from Wordpress?
item.dc:creator: mckenna.niall
item.description:
Hi,

This may seem like a stupid question & maybe I’ve misread the docs but I can’t figure out if Frontity automatically Lazy Loads images from Wordpress? I’ve seen the component mentioned, but if the images come from Wordpress via the HTM2React processor, then it isn’t using an component. Can anyone clarify this for me?

Read full topic
item.source: Does Frontity automatically Lazy load images from Wordpress?
